hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */src/*.ts) case "$f" in *.test.ts) ;; *) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Phase discipline (CLAUDE.md): spec synced via specman sync BEFORE code? new module -> excavate; small change -> chisel? test written BEFORE this body?"}}' ;; esac ;; esac
